creator: salfrancl@yahoo.es
text:
hello .. i solved this situation

how can i did that?

I 
examined the line that invoke extraction on 'Makefile' .. originally it 
looks like this:


@${UNZIP_CMD} ${EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS} 
${DISTDIR}/${DISTFILES} -d ${INSTDIR}


then I examined each 
variable to get an idea of what command will be invoked and I saw the 
error was on 'EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS' variable

[root@sasuke 
/usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/ports-all/ports/textproc/iso8879]# 
PORTSDIR=/usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/ports-all/ports make -V 
EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS
-dc


there is a conflict:  -dc  
<==> -d ${INSTDIR}

well I removed that variable and all 
works .. here is the tinderbox log and i attach the unified diff:
